api_documentation.title: eZee Connectivity Portal – YCS Connectivity API
api_documentation.description: The YCS Connectivity API enables Connectivity Partners to send and retrieve data for hotel properties. Built on REST principles with predictable, resource-oriented URLs. Supports XML, JSON, and CSV response formats. Connectivity Partners can manage rates, availability, bookings, housekeeping, and more from their own systems.

sandbox.description: Sandbox environment for testing. Register at https://api.ezeetechnosys.com/registration/ to get credentials.

production.description: Live production environment. Contact integration@ezeetechnosys.com to obtain credentials.

authentication.description: YCS Connectivity APIs use the basic HTTP authentication scheme. Every request must include a valid hotel code and authentication token.

User-Agent.description: Every API request must include this User-Agent header.

HotelCode.description: Unique hotel identifier assigned to the property

AuthCode.description: Unique authentication token for the property

APIKey.description: Unique API key (used interchangeably with AuthCode in some endpoints)

authentication_failure_responses.error_message: Error: Invalid Auth Code. Please enter proper Auth Code.
Unauthorized Access: Invalid Auth Code or Hotel Code.
Sandbox User Trial Period is expired. So, you can't access it.
Sandbox User Auth Code is inactive.

troubleshooting: Ensure request includes a proper Authorization header
Verify sandbox account credentials are correct
Confirm you have access to the endpoint you are calling

cors.note: Never expose your secret API key in any public website's client-side code.

configuration.description: Master data APIs used by connectivity partners for system mappings.

apis.name: Check Hotel Authentication
apis.description: Checks authentication and returns hotel information if authentication is valid.

error_codes.code: Invalid API Request. Don't have this API access

apis.name: Retrieve Room Information
apis.description: Provides room types, rate types, and rate plans information for a property.

request_parameters.name: NeedPhysicalRooms

error_codes.description: Unauthorized Request. Please check hotel code and authentication code

apis.name: Retrieve Hotel Information
apis.description: Provides a list of hotel information for groups or chains. Mainly used for displaying data in combo boxes.

request_parameters.name: GroupCode
request_parameters.description: Unique Group code (use for chain properties)

request_parameters.name: HotelCode
request_parameters.description: Unique Hotel code (use for single properties)

request_parameters.name: language
request_parameters.description: Language code. Default is 'en'. See language codes list in the portal.

response_parameters.name: HotelImages
response_parameters.description: List of hotel image file names

error_codes.description: This request is valid for Reservation Account only. You may not have opted for Reservation Account Or Hotel Code and Authentication are invalid.
Unauthorized request. This request is not valid for this hotel code.
Your property doesn't have access to API integration or Key is incorrect. Please contact support.

apis.name: Retrieve Hotel Amenities
apis.description: Provides the list of hotel amenities for a property, used for display on websites or external applications.

response_parameters.name: amenity
response_parameters.description: Name of the amenity available at the hotel

error_codes.description: This request is valid for Reservation Account only.

apis.name: Retrieve Room Types
apis.description: Provides limited room type information for a property, useful for mapping or display in external applications.

request_parameters.name: publishtoweb
request_parameters.description: 1 = retrieve all room types; 0 = retrieve only room types published to web. Default is 0.

response_parameters.name: shortcode
response_parameters.description: Short code for the room type

error_codes.description: This request is valid for Reservation Account only.
Unauthorized request. This request is not valid for this hotel code.
Your property doesn't have access to API integration or Key is incorrect.

apis.name: Retrieve Salutations and Country
apis.description: Provides salutation codes and country list configured for a property, for display in external applications.

response_parameters.name: Salutation
response_parameters.description: Key-value map of salutation codes to salutation labels

response_parameters.name: CountryList
response_parameters.description: Key-value map of country IDs to country names

error_codes.description: This request is valid for Reservation Account only.
Your property doesn't have access to API integration or Key is incorrect.
Timeout requested. Stops requests for the specified time.

apis.name: Retrieve Extras Rate Based on Parameters
apis.description: Calculates total extra service charge based on configured Extra Charges, check-in date, and check-out date. Supports both single and multiple extra charges. Requires eZee Reservation.

request_parameters.name: ExtraChargeId
request_parameters.description: Single or multiple comma-separated extra charge IDs for the property

request_parameters.name: Total_ExtraItem
request_parameters.description: Total number of items per extra charge. For Per Pax rule: Adults + Children. For Per Quantity: quantity. Comma-separated for multiple charges.
notes: Sample 1: Extra charge Rule Per Pax, Adults: 2, Child: 1 → Pass Total_ExtraItem=3
Sample 2: Extra charge Rule Per Quantity, Quantity: 2 → Pass Total_ExtraItem=2

response_parameters.name: IndividualCharge
response_parameters.description: Map of extra charge IDs to their individual calculated charges

response_parameters.name: TotalCharge
response_parameters.description: Total of all combined extra charges

error_codes.description: This request is valid for Reservation Account only.
Check out date should be greater than Check in date
Your property doesn't have access to API integration or Key is incorrect.

apis.name: Verify Travel Agent
apis.description: Verifies a Travel Agent user and returns verified Travel Agent information for properties where the agent is created. Requires eZee Reservation.

request_parameters.name: password
request_parameters.description: Base64 encoded encrypted password. Use base64_encode() to encode password.

request_parameters.name: groupcode
request_parameters.description: Unique group code for a registered chain of properties

response_parameters.name: isusercreated
response_parameters.description: Whether user was created (1 = yes, 0 = no)

error_codes.description: This request is valid for Reservation Account only. Groups Code and Authentication may be invalid.
Your property doesn't have access to API integration or Key is incorrect.

apis.description: Provides all configured payment gateways available for the Booking Engine. Requires eZee Reservation.

response_parameters.name: CurrencyList.ExchangeRate

apis.description: Returns all active payment methods available in the hotel, including surcharge details.

apis.name: Retrieve Identity Type
apis.description: Returns all active identity types (e.g., Passport, Driving License) configured in the hotel.

apis.name: Retrieve Available Room List
apis.description: Fetches available room data between check-in and check-out dates. Optionally filter by specific Room ID or Room Type ID.

request_parameters.name: RoomID
request_parameters.description: Optional. Filter by specific Room Unique ID

request_parameters.name: RoomtypeID
request_parameters.description: Optional. Filter by specific Room Type Unique ID

error_codes.description: From Date is not a valid date
To Date is not a valid date
To Date should be greater than From Date
Invalid Value. Please check with RoomType Data
Invalid Value. Please check with Room Data

rates_and_availability.description: Use the Rates & Availability APIs to set availability, rates, and restrictions for a property's rooms.

apis.name: Update Room Inventory
apis.description: Updates room inventory (availability count) for a specified date range and room type. Availability is set at the room type level only — not at the rate plan level.
important_notes: Availability is specified per room type, not per rate plan.
Example: If room type A has 10 rooms total, you cannot split it as 3 for rate plan X and 7 for rate plan Y. You can only set total availability = 10.

error_codes.description: All Sources are using inventory of another source; no update allowed.

apis.name: Update Linear Rate
apis.description: Sets linear (flat) room rates for a specified date range. Rates are defined per Room Type and Rate Type combination. Linear pricing applies a fixed rate for the base occupancy plus additional flat amounts per extra adult or child.
apis.pricing_model_explanation: In linear pricing, you set a base price for the standard occupancy. Additional charges for extra adults and children are flat amounts. Example: Base price $3000 for 2 adults + 1 child. Extra adult = $500. Extra child = $300.

request_parameters.name: Sources.ContactId
request_parameters.description: Array of Source Contact IDs for targeted rate updates

apis.name: Update Non-Linear Rate
apis.description: Sets occupancy-based (non-linear) room rates for a specified date range. Rates are defined per Room Type and Rate Type combination. Allows individually configured charges for each adult/child count from 1 to 7.
apis.pricing_model_explanation: In non-linear pricing, you independently configure the cost per occupancy level. Example: Base $3000 for 2 adults + 1 child. Extra child 1 = $300. Extra child 2 = $400. This gives maximum pricing flexibility.

error_codes.description: Invalid rate for any value between Adult1 to Adult7

apis.name: Retrieve Room Rates with Source Details
apis.description: Provides room types, rate types, rate plans, and separate channel source information for a property.

apis.name: Update Max Nights
apis.description: Updates the maximum length-of-stay restriction for specific date ranges. Restricts booking if the reservation includes a date requiring a longer stay than the maximum.

apis.name: Update Min Nights
apis.description: Updates the minimum length-of-stay restriction for specific date ranges. Restricts booking if the reservation includes a date requiring a shorter stay than the minimum.

apis.name: Update StopSell
apis.description: Opens or closes StopSell for specific date ranges. When StopSell is enabled, the room becomes unavailable for booking on the specified dates.

request_parameters.name: StopSell
request_parameters.description: StopSell flag. 1 = Enable StopSell (room unavailable), 0 = Disable StopSell (room available)

apis.name: Update Close On Arrival (COA)
apis.description: Applies or removes Close On Arrival restrictions. When COA is enabled, guests cannot check in on the specified dates.

request_parameters.name: COA
request_parameters.description: COA flag. 1 = Enable COA (no check-in), 0 = Disable COA (check-in allowed)

apis.name: Update Close On Departure (COD)
apis.description: Applies or removes Close On Departure restrictions. When COD is enabled, guests cannot check out on the specified dates.

request_parameters.name: COD
request_parameters.description: COD flag. 1 = Enable COD (no check-out), 0 = Disable COD (check-out allowed)

apis.name: Retrieve Room Inventory
apis.description: Returns room inventory data for a specific date range and room type.

apis.name: Retrieve Room Rates
apis.description: Returns room rate data for a specific date range, room type, and rate type.

bookings.description: Use the Bookings APIs to retrieve reservations, modifications, and cancellations. Also allows checking availability and creating new bookings.

apis.name: Check Availability
apis.description: Checks room availability including rate plans, pricing, taxes, promotions, and packages for a property.

request_parameters.name: check_out_date
request_parameters.description: Check-out date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to num_nights after check-in if not provided.

request_parameters.name: num_nights
request_parameters.description: Number of nights. Defaults to 10 days after check-in. Maximum range is 30 days from check-in.

request_parameters.name: num_rooms
request_parameters.description: Total number of rooms required. Default is 1.

request_parameters.name: promotion_code
request_parameters.description: Unique Promotion Code. Default is empty.

request_parameters.name: property_configuration_info
request_parameters.description: Based on property booking engine settings. Default is 0. When 0, use showtax, show_only_available_rooms, and show_matched_minimum_nights_rateplans to control response.

request_parameters.name: showtax
request_parameters.description: Controls tax-inclusive vs tax-exclusive rates. Only applies when property_configuration_info=0.

request_parameters.name: show_only_available_rooms
request_parameters.description: 1 = return only available rate plans. Only applies when property_configuration_info=0. Default 0.

request_parameters.name: show_matched_minimum_nights_rateplans
request_parameters.description: Controls minimum nights filtering. 0=no filter, 1=match min nights criteria, 2=match exactly. Only applies when property_configuration_info=0.

request_parameters.name: language
request_parameters.description: Language code. See portal for full list.

request_parameters.name: roomtypeunkid
request_parameters.description: Unique RoomType ID to filter results to a specific room type

request_parameters.name: packagefor
request_parameters.description: Controls package data platform. Default returns desktop packages only.

request_parameters.name: promotionfor
request_parameters.description: Controls promotion data platform. Default returns desktop promotions only.

global_error_codes.description: Common error codes returned across multiple endpoints

codes.description: From Date is not a valid date
To Date is not a valid date
To Date must be greater than From Date
Unauthorized request. Request Type is not valid for this hotel code
Unauthorized request. Hotel code is not active
Unauthorized Request. Please check hotel code and authentication code
Unauthorized Request. Integration is not allowed
Unauthorized Access: Invalid Auth Code or Hotel Code
Sandbox User Auth Code is inactive
Sandbox User Trial Period has expired

data_types_reference.INT(20): Large integer, up to 20 digits — used for unique IDs
data_types_reference.VARCHAR(n): Variable-length string of up to n characters
data_types_reference.DECIMAL(19,4): Decimal number with up to 19 digits and 4 decimal places — used for monetary values
data_types_reference.DATETIME: Date (and optionally time) in YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format

api_documentation.id_format_note: All Unique IDs in this API are 19-digit integers in the format XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX (e.g., 1234500000000000001). These IDs encode the hotel code prefix followed by a sequential number.
